reviews.name: 꾸***
reviews.content: 정말 귀엽고 색깔도 쨍해서 더 눈이가는 공 시리즈에요! 바다 친구들의 디자인이라니 너무 귀여워요..정말 잘 가지고 놀고 지느러미, 꼬리등 물기 쉬운 부분이 있어서 엄청 잘 놀아요! 공도 작아서 소형견들한테 딱 알맞는 사이즈였습니다. 솜이 들어있지 않은 제품이라 더 소리도 잘나요!! 삑삑 소리 좋아하는 친구들에게 강추합니다.
reviews.content_en: Such a cute ball series with vibrant colors that really catch the eye! 🐾 The ocean friends design is so adorable... My pup really loves playing with it, and since the fins and tails are easy to bite on, she plays with it constantly! The ball is small too, so it's the perfect size for small dogs. Since there's no stuffing inside, the squeaky sound comes through really well!! Highly recommend for dogs that love squeaky toys.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 리틀 오션 프렌즈 공 장난감 세트 체험단 후기 🐶🩵

3개가 한 세트로 구성되어 있어서 더 만족스러웠어요 :) 
각각 캐릭터 디자인이 다 달라서 보는 재미도 있고, 너무 귀여워서 시리즈별로 전부 소장하고 싶은 느낌이에요 🐡🐠🦭

촉감도 부드럽고 폭신해서 강아지가 물고 놀기 좋고, 삑삑 소리도 적당해서 흥미를 잘 가지더라고요 🫧 
공 형태라 굴리면서 놀아주기에도 좋고, 혼자 가지고 놀 때도 잘 가지고 놀아서 만족스러웠어요 🎾✨

장난감인데도 인형처럼 디자인이 예뻐서 그냥 두어도 귀엽고, 사진 찍을 때도 정말 잘 나와요 📸💙 
특히 선물용으로도 만족도가 높을 것 같은 제품입니다 🎁

귀여움과 실용성을 모두 갖춘 장난감이라 추천하고 싶어요
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Little Ocean Friends Ball Toy Set Review 🐶🩵

I was even more satisfied because it comes as a set of 3 :) Each character has a different design, so it's fun just to look at them, and they're so cute that I want to collect the whole series! 🐡🐠🦭

The texture is soft and fluffy, making it great for dogs to bite and play with, and the squeaky sound is just right to keep their interest 🫧 The ball shape is perfect for rolling around while playing, and my pup enjoys playing with it alone too, so I'm really satisfied 🎾✨

Even though it's a toy, the design is so pretty like a plush that it looks cute just sitting around, and it photographs really well 📸💙 It seems like it would be especially satisfying as a gift 🎁

It's a toy that has both cuteness and practicality, so I'd definitely recommend it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 공은 크기가 작은 편이라 소형견 친구들도 물기 딱 좋아요. 그동안 바잇미에서 나온 공 시리즈는 거의 다 잘 가지고 놀았는데요, 저희 강아지는 특히 귀처럼 작게 ‘앙!’ 하고 물 수 있는 포인트를 좋아하거든요. 이번 리틀오션프렌즈는 지느러미랑 꼬리처럼 물 수 있는 부분이 많아서 더 마음에 들더라고요. 역시나 완전 취향 저격! 삑삑 소리도 나고, 물고 놀기도 좋고, 던지면서 놀기에도 딱이에요.
#체험단
reviews.content_en: BITE ME balls are on the smaller side, so they're perfect for small dogs to bite. We've had our pup play with almost all the ball series BITE ME has released, and my dog especially loves those little spots where she can bite like "nom!" - little ears and such. This Little Ocean Friends has even more biteable parts like fins and tails, so I like it even more! Definitely hits the spot! The squeaky sound is great, it's fun to bite, and it's perfect for throwing and playing fetch too. #ProductReview

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
#체험단
바잇미 장난감이 많이 있는 편인데, 기존에 있던 삑삑이들보다 월등히 소리가 잘 났어요. 꾹꾹 눌러야지만 소리나고 작게 나는 삑삑이들도 많은데 쉽고 편하게 눌리면서 소리가 너무너무 경쾌한게 너무 신나해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ그리고 바잇미 장난감 귀엽게 잘 뽑기로 유명한데 이번것도 뭐 제 장난감 삼고 싶어요ㅜㅜㅜ점점 더워지는 날씨에 낮시간 산책이 어려워지고 있는데 요거 3개 돌아가면서 놀아주면 덜 심심해하고 스트레스 풀려해서 다행이예요~아 그리고 튼튼해서 소형견 기준 막 물어뜯어도 실밥하나 떨어져나오지 않는다구요^^
reviews.content_en:
#ProductReview
BITE ME has lots of toys, but this one has way better sound quality than the other squeaky toys I've had before. A lot of squeaky toys need a lot of pressure to make a sound or only squeak quietly, but this one is so easy to press and the sound is super upbeat and cheerful haha! And BITE ME is famous for designing cute toys, and I want to keep this one as my own toy too 😭 The weather's been getting hotter and it's harder to take long walks during the day, so I'm glad I can rotate through these 3 toys to keep my pup entertained and help them de-stress~ Oh and it's so durable that even if my small dog chews on it aggressively, not a single thread comes loose ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
#체험단
일단 매번 내돈내산으로 바잇미 장난감을 항상 구매했는데
처음으로 체험단에 당첨되서 전 너무 좋아요!!!감사합니다

저희 강아지들은 삑삑소리에 미쳐 역시나 좋아해용
바닥에 던지면 통통튀겨 더 재밋게 놀아줄수있구
겉면이 부들부들 원단이라 더 좋습니다!!!!
바잇미 장난감은 정말 종류별로 가지고 있는데 맘에안드는게 하나없네용
삑삑이 장난감들은 더더더욱 최고최고입니당👍👍
reviews.content_en:
#ProductReview
First of all, I've always bought BITE ME toys with my own money every time, so getting picked for the product review team for the first time makes me so happy!!! Thank you so much 🙏

My dogs are obsessed with squeaky sounds and they love these as expected! When you throw them on the ground they bounce around and it's even more fun to play with them. The outer fabric is really soft too!!!! I have BITE ME toys of different types and there's not a single one I dislike 💯 The squeaky toys are especially the best 👍👍

reviews.name: 배로
reviews.content:
삑삑볼이라면 환장하는 배로인데요! 솜이 없어서 강아지가 물어 뜯고 놀아도 안전하고 탱탱볼처럼 튕겨서 던지고 가져오면서 공놀이하기 너무 좋더라구요. 삑삑 소리도 커서 야외에서도 장난감이랑 뛰어 놀기 좋을 것 같아요!
장난감 팔이랑 꼬리 물고 오는데 공 크기가 5cm로 적당해서 3.2kg 소형견이 놀기에도 충분해요! 바잇미 리틀 오션 프렌즈 공 장난감 세트 왕왕 추천드립니다~~!
reviews.content_en: My dog Bae is crazy for squeaky balls! Since there's no stuffing inside, it's safe even when my pup bites and chews on it, and it bounces like a bouncy ball so it's so much fun to throw and fetch with. The squeaky sound is loud too, so it seems great for playing outside with the toy! My dog loves to bite the toy's fins and tail, and the 5cm ball size is just right so my 3.2kg small dog has plenty of room to play! I highly recommend the BITE ME Little Ocean Friends Ball Toy Set ~~!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 라텍스장난감이랑 같이 구입했는데 저중에서도 니모?오렌지색을 젤 좋아했어요ㅎ잘가지고 놉니다
reviews.content_en: I got it along with a latex toy, and out of those my pup loved the orange one (Nemo?) the best 😊 He really enjoys playing with it

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 바잇미에서 나오는 공을 너무 좋아해서 새로운 디자인 나올때마다 사고있어요!!
reviews.content_en: I love the BITE ME balls so much that I buy them every time a new design comes out!!

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 이런류 장난감을 젤 좋아하는데 역시나 배추 신상도 같이 사서 왔는데 이 장난감 먼저 달라고 하고 계속 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves this type of toy the most, and I got the new cabbage design along with this one, but she asks for this toy first and just keeps playing with it
